title: General primary law to apply
doc_html:
§143.  General primary law to apply

The special election shall be held in accordance with Title 18, Chapter 2, Part I, except as specially provided for in this Sub-part.
doc_text:
§143.  General primary law to apply
The special election shall be held in accordance with Title 18, Chapter 2, Part I, except as specially provided for in this Sub-part.
